message.reasoning_content:
We need to produce JSON for stage web-003-chain-link: create webpage 3 and link it back to page 2 while preserving existing page 1 and page 2 links. Existing files: site/index.html (page1) and site/page-2.html (page2) as given. We need to create site/page-3.html that links back to page 2 (i.e., href="page-2.html"? Actually page2 is at site/page-2.html relative to site/. Since page3 will be also in site/, link should be "page-2.html". Also we must preserve existing links: page1's nav is empty, page2's link to index.html must remain unchanged. So we should not modify index.html or page-2.html. Thus only new file: site/page-3.html. Content: similar structure: DOCTYPE, html, head with meta charset, title "Page 3", body with nav (empty), main with content "This is page 3." and a link back to page-2.html: Back to Page 2. We must ensure we don't break existing links: we are not modifying them. Thus output JSON with files array containing one object. Let's craft. Note: The JSON must be exactly as described, no extra text. We'll output: { "files": [ { "path": "site/page-3.html", "content": "\n\n\n \n Page 3\n\n\n
\n
\n This is page 3.\n Back to Page 2\n
\n\n" } ], "notes": "Created page-3.html with link back to page-2.html." } Make sure no trailing commas. Let's produce that.
